vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-code
vBRIEFInfo.description: PAN-1055: Add harness selection beside dashboard model selection flows

plan.title: Dashboard harness picker for model flows
plan.author: agent:claude-code

narratives.Problem: Dashboard model selectors must also let users choose the coding-agent harness so Claude Code remains the default while Pi can be selected where policy allows.
narratives.Approach: Use shared model/harness picker primitives, persist harness choices with model choices, enforce the Pi + Anthropic subscription ToS gate consistently, and thread the effective harness into planning, work-agent, conversation, and fork spawns.

items.title: Implement harness picker and persistence across dashboard model flows

narrative.Action: Add shared HarnessSelect/ModelHarnessPicker UI, persist settings harness_overrides, apply canonical policy, and send effective harness values through planning, work-agent, conversation, and fork launch paths.

subItems.title: Every dashboard model selector includes a harness selector using shared picker primitives
Claude Code is the default harness and Pi is available as an alternative where allowed
Pi is blocked only for Anthropic models authenticated through Claude Code subscription
Harness choices persist through the same settings and launch paths as model choices
Planning, work-agent, conversation, and fork spawns use the selected or saved effective harness
Vitest coverage protects disabled-Pi policy and settings harness round-trip behavior
